info.title: Audience Score Read API
info.description: DESIGN DRAFT — there is no live deployment of this API yet. This document specifies the planned public REST read path, a mirror of the MCP `get_score` tool that is the current reference read interface (see /reference-impl). Reading scores requires no authentication. Every response is an Ed25519-signed score manifest: verify `sig` over the canonical JSON of `manifest` against `signer`; trusting the transport or the server is never required.

get.summary: Get the signed audience score manifest for a vendor
get.description: Returns the percentage of verified thumbs-up over attestation-gated verdicts, with sample size, Wilson 95% lower bound, dimension sub-scores, locality scope, spec version, and a provenance hash of the exact event set used — signed by the rendering key.

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: Optional US state code to scope the score (e.g. CO). Omitted = national scope.

signer.description: Rendering public key: base64url-encoded SPKI DER Ed25519

sig.description: base64url Ed25519 signature over the canonical JSON of `manifest` (keys sorted at every level, no whitespace)

displayed.description: False below the 10-verdict floor or when total weight is zero; when false, score fields are null

event_set_hash.description: sha256 hex of the sorted ids of the exact event set used
